section.title: Recruiter Mode
section.description: A compressed professional briefing designed for rapid candidate evaluation.

executiveSummary.headline: AI and full-stack engineering candidate building practical intelligent systems.
executiveSummary.description: Gautam Kumar combines computer science coursework with applied projects across AI workflows, computer vision, backend systems, and typed frontend experiences. His portfolio is structured as a recruiter-facing command center with evidence of phased execution and system thinking.
